scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run validate:data && npm run test
scripts.check:js: node --check script.js && node --check api-live.js && node --check stocks-api.js && node --check js/clinical-orientation.js && node --check js/care-facilities.js && node --check js/diagnostic-engine.js && node --check api/care-nearby.js && node --check api/overpass.js && node --check scripts/spf-bulletin-ai.mjs && node --check scripts/who-don-fetch.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-data.mjs && node --check scripts/test-clinical-care.mjs && node --check scripts/test-diagnostic-engine.mjs
scripts.build: npx terser script.js --compress --mangle -o script.min.js && npx terser js/clinical-orientation.js --compress --mangle -o js/clinical-orientation.min.js && npx terser js/care-facilities.js --compress --mangle -o js/care-facilities.min.js && npx terser js/diagnostic-engine.js --compress --mangle -o js/diagnostic-engine.min.js && npx cleancss -o style.min.css style.css && echo Build done
